name: Corev
description: Versioned config management tools powered by Corev CLI.

corevBin.description: Absolute path to the corev binary. If omitted, plugin executes `corev` from PATH.

workingDirectory.description: Working directory to run Corev in (defaults to process.cwd()).

defaultProject.description: Default project name used when project is omitted.

defaultEnv.description: Default env used when --env is omitted.

hostApiUrl.description: Base URL where corev-host runs (example: http://127.0.0.1:3000).

hostMongoUri.description: MongoDB connection URI used to generate local src/host/server/.env.

hostPort.description: Port used for local corev-host server (default: 3000).

hostSessionSecret.description: Session secret written to local host .env.

hostJwtSecret.description: JWT secret written to local host .env.

hostNodeEnv.description: NODE_ENV value written to local host .env (default: development).

hostStartCommand.description: Command used to start corev-host (example: npm run dev).

hostStopCommand.description: Optional command used to stop corev-host. If omitted, plugin uses pid-based stop.

hostCreateUserCommand.description: Optional custom command used in local src/host/server to create dashboard user. If omitted, plugin uses /api/auth/signup.

hostHealthPath.description: Health check path appended to hostApiUrl (default: /health).
